'''âh-k-p''' ('''kahakap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rin|rin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rin|rin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahakap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihakap|thihakap]] || [[word:jihakap|jihakap]] || [[word:shihakap|shihakap]] || [[word:kihakap|kihakap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhakap|thuthuhakap]] || [[word:jujuhakap|jujuhakap]] || [[word:shushuhakap|shushuhakap]] || [[word:kukuhakap|kukuhakap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhakap|thuhakap]] || [[word:juhakap|juhakap]] || [[word:shuhakap|shuhakap]] || [[word:kuhakap|kuhakap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhakap|thuhakap]] || [[word:juhakap|juhakap]] || [[word:shuhakap|shuhakap]] || [[word:kuhakap|kuhakap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehakap|thehakap]] || [[word:jehakap|jehakap]] || [[word:shehakap|shehakap]] || [[word:kehakap|kehakap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohakap|thothohakap]] || [[word:jojohakap|jojohakap]] || [[word:shoshohakap|shoshohakap]] || [[word:kokohakap|kokohakap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohakap|thohakap]] || [[word:johakap|johakap]] || [[word:shohakap|shohakap]] || [[word:kohakap|kohakap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohakap|thohakap]] || [[word:johakap|johakap]] || [[word:shohakap|shohakap]] || [[word:kohakap|kohakap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhakap|thĂŠhakap]] || [[word:jĂŠhakap|jĂŠhakap]] || [[word:shĂŠhakap|shĂŠhakap]] || [[word:kĂŠhakap|kĂŠhakap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahakap|thathahakap]] || [[word:jajahakap|jajahakap]] || [[word:shashahakap|shashahakap]] || [[word:kakahakap|kakahakap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahakap|thahakap]] || [[word:jahakap|jahakap]] || [[word:shahakap|shahakap]] || [[word:kahakap|kahakap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahakap|thahakap]] || [[word:jahakap|jahakap]] || [[word:shahakap|shahakap]] || [[word:kahakap|kahakap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahakap|shahakap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahakap|goshahakap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahakap|gokishahakap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahakapnĂŒ|shahakapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahakapnknĂŒ|goshahakapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakapnĂŒ|gokishahakapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahakapshĂ«|shahakapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahakapnkshĂ«|goshahakapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahakapshĂ«|gokishahakapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakapro|shahakapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakapnkro|goshahakapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakapro|gokishahakapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakapmu|shahakapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakapnkmu|goshahakapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakapmu|gokishahakapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahakapsher|shahakapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahakapnksher|goshahakapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahakapsher|gokishahakapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahakapng|shahakapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahakapnkng|goshahakapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahakapng|gokishahakapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahakapya|shahakapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahakapnkya|goshahakapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahakapya|gokishahakapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahakapyam|shahakapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahakapnkyam|goshahakapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahakapyam|gokishahakapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakapnĂŒshĂ«|shahakapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahakapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahakapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakapnĂŒro|shahakapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakapnknĂŒro|goshahakapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakapnĂŒro|gokishahakapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakapnĂŒmu|shahakapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakapnknĂŒmu|goshahakapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakapnĂŒmu|gokishahakapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakapshĂ«nĂŒ|shahakapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahakapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahakapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakapshĂ«ro|shahakapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakapnkshĂ«ro|goshahakapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakapshĂ«ro|gokishahakapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakapshĂ«mu|shahakapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakapnkshĂ«mu|goshahakapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakapshĂ«mu|gokishahakapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakapronĂŒ|shahakapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakapnkronĂŒ|goshahakapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakapronĂŒ|gokishahakapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakaproshĂ«|shahakaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakapnkroshĂ«|goshahakapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakaproshĂ«|gokishahakaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahakapromu|shahakapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahakapnkromu|goshahakapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahakapromu|gokishahakapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahakapmunĂŒ|shahakapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahakapnkmunĂŒ|goshahakapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahakapmunĂŒ|gokishahakapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahakapmushĂ«|shahakapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahakapnkmushĂ«|goshahakapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahakapmushĂ«|gokishahakapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahakapmuro|shahakapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahakapnkmuro|goshahakapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahakapmuro|gokishahakapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
